ID:       ddx-7a26141e
Title:    doc-graph: Playwright test for non-overlapping layout + no regression
Type:     task
Status:   in_progress
Priority: 2
Labels:   phase:2, story:3, area:web, area:tests, kind:test
Owner:    erik
Parent:   ddx-86ccbb75
Deps:     ddx-a9edd569
Desc:     Deterministic e2e test for non-overlapping layout. Bounding-box checks for nodes; bounding-box-vs-circle checks for labels. No regression on existing graph e2e.
Accept:   1. New Playwright test asserts no node-bbox overlap and no label-bbox-vs-circle overlap after settle. 2. cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test:e2e -- graph passes. 3. Existing graph e2e still passes.

ID:       ddx-a9edd569
Title:    doc-graph: label-aware collision, degree-tuned forces, bounded convergence, settle/freeze semantics
Type:     task
Status:   closed
Priority: 2
Labels:   phase:2, story:3, area:web, kind:feature
Parent:   ddx-86ccbb75
Deps:     ddx-0e6ff1c5
Desc:     Replace forceCollide(48) circle-only collision with custom quadtree force that includes label bounding boxes (labels at x=24, up to 32 chars). Tune forceManyBody and forceLink for degree distribution. Add bounded-convergence (auto-freeze after settle). Drag-end semantics: release fx/fy (codex's recommendation, not re-pin).
Accept:   1. Custom label-aware collision force lands in D3Graph.svelte. 2. No two node circles overlap after settle on the 128-node fixture (Playwright bounding-box check). 3. Label bounding boxes do not overlap other nodes' circles after settle. 4. Settle completes within 2s (reported, not gated, per codex).
